_comment: Per-slug score adjustments applied after vetting. Each entry adds 'delta' (signed int) to the project's total. The reason is shown prominently on the public scoreboard card + modal — keep it concise and honest.

ayush-makwana__askcricket.label: Volunteer adjustment
ayush-makwana__askcricket.reason: Ayush served as an event volunteer during APL 2026 in addition to submitting a project. To preserve fairness for non-volunteer participants, a transparency adjustment of −5 is applied to his total. The judges' scoring of his project is unchanged — this disclosure exists so the conflict of interest is visible on the public scoreboard rather than hidden.
